heading: Nondisclosure of board proceedings
label: 613a Nondisclosure of board proceedings
notes: Amendments2023—Subsecs. (a), (c). substituted “573, 611, 628, or 20211” for “573, 611, or 628”.Pub. L. 118–312011—Subsec. (a). , added subsec. (a) and struck out former subsec. (a). Prior to amendment, text read as follows: “The proceedings of a selection board convened under section 611 this title may not be disclosed to any person not a member of the board.”Pub. L. 111–383, § 503(a)(1)Subsec. (b). , substituted “Notes, and Records” for “and Records” in heading.Pub. L. 111–383, § 503(a)(2)Subsec. (c). , added subsec. (c).Pub. L. 111–383, § 503(a)(3)

Effective Date, , , provided that:Pub. L. 109–364, div. A, title V, § 547(c)120 Stat. 2216Oct. 17, 2006“, United States Code, as added by subsection (a), shall apply with respect to the proceedings of all selection boards convened under section 611 of that title, including selection boards convened before the date of the enactment of this Act []. Section 14104 of such title, as amended by subsection (b), shall apply with respect to the proceedings of all selection boards convened under section 14101 of that title, including selection boards convened before the date of the enactment of this Act.”Section 613a of title 10Oct. 17, 2006

children.heading: .—Prohibition on Disclosure
children.label: a .—Prohibition on Disclosure
children.text: The proceedings of a selection board convened under section 573, 611, 628, or 20211 of this title may not be disclosed to any person not a member of the board, except as authorized or required to process the report of the board. This prohibition is a statutory exemption from disclosure, as described in .section 552(b)(3) of title 5

children.heading: .—Prohibited Uses of Board Discussions, Deliberations, Notes, and Records
children.label: b .—Prohibited Uses of Board Discussions, Deliberations, Notes, and Records

children.text: may not be admitted as evidence; and
may not be used for any purpose in any action, suit, or judicial or administrative proceeding without the consent of the Secretary of the military department concerned.

children.heading: .—Applicability
children.label: c .—Applicability
children.text: This section applies to all selection boards convened under section 573, 611, 628, or 20211 of this title, regardless of the date on which the board was convened.
